name: pict-provider-keybindings-example-shortcuts-playground
description: Shortcuts Playground - interactive catalog of every pict-provider-keybindings feature

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

ExampleApplication.Title: Shortcuts Playground
ExampleApplication.Summary: Interactive catalog of every pict-provider-keybindings primitive: app-global bindings, chords, key sequences, the cheatsheet, input guarding, suspend/resume, scopes, per-binding disable, and a live active-bindings list.
